'''Geothray Camber''' was a [[Sector Plexus/Legends|Sector Plexus]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] working in [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. Camber proposed the creation of the [[Hyperspace Orbiting Scanner]], a device capable of eavesdropping on virtually any computer by bypassing its security systems. However, Camber had several theoretical and technical problems, and sent a series of [[Scandoc/Legends|scandocs]] with specifications to [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Lindu Sencker]]. Sencker's team overcame the problems in Camber's design, and the Hyperspace Orbiting Scanner became a reality.<ref name="ISB" />
